# Rani Beauty Clinic

> Physician-supervised medspa in Renton, WA offering advanced aesthetic treatments and medical wellness programs under the supervision of Dr. Alexander Landfield, Board-Certified Neurologist. Woman-owned. Open 7 days a week. Serving all of King County, Washington.

## About

Rani Beauty Clinic is a premier medical aesthetics clinic located at 401 Olympia Ave NE, Suite 101, Renton, WA 98056. Founded in 2022, the clinic is woman-owned and physician-supervised. Every medical treatment is performed under the oversight of Dr. Alexander Landfield, a board-certified neurologist serving as Medical Director. The clinic is rated 4.9 stars on Google with 127+ five-star reviews. Open Monday through Sunday, 10 AM to 7 PM.

## Contact

- Phone: (425) 539-4440
- Email: info@ranibeautyclinic.com
- Website: https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com
- Booking: https://booking.mangomint.com/ranibeautyclinic1
- Address: 401 Olympia Ave NE, Suite 101, Renton, WA 98056

## Aesthetic Services

- [Laser Hair Removal](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/laser-hair-removal): Permanent hair reduction for unwanted facial and body hair, ingrown hairs, folliculitis, and pseudofolliculitis barbae (razor bumps). $79-$1,199 per session priced by treatment area, with a 6-session package recommended for full follicle clearance. Uses the Candela GentleMax Pro Plus dual-wavelength platform (755nm Alexandrite for lighter skin and 1064nm Nd:YAG for deeper pigment penetration), which targets melanin in the hair follicle and disables future growth. Safe for all Fitzpatrick skin types I-VI including darker skin tones that other lasers cannot treat safely.
- [Botox & Dysport](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/botox-dysport): Neuromodulator injections for forehead lines, glabellar "11s," crow's feet, brow lift, lip flip, masseter slimming, bunny lines, chin dimpling, and neck bands. $14/unit for Botox (Allergan) and $4–5/unit for Dysport (Galderma), both FDA-approved botulinum toxin type A formulations that temporarily block acetylcholine release at the neuromuscular junction to relax targeted muscles. Results appear in 3–7 days and last 3–4 months. Every treatment is supervised by Dr. Alexander Landfield, a board-certified neurologist whose expertise in facial nerve anatomy and muscle dynamics delivers a level of injection precision that general practitioners and nurse injectors cannot match.
- [Dermal Fillers](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/dermal-fillers): Hyaluronic acid (HA) injections for volume loss, lip enhancement, cheek contouring, jawline definition, chin projection, nasolabial folds, marionette lines, and tear troughs. $799–1,199 per syringe across the Juvederm (Allergan), Restylane (Galderma), and Versa (Revance) product families, each engineered with different HA cross-linking densities to match tissue depth and mobility. Results are immediate and last 9–18 months depending on product and treatment area; fully reversible with hyaluronidase if needed. Placement is supervised by board-certified neurologist Dr. Alexander Landfield, whose deep understanding of facial vasculature and nerve anatomy reduces risk of vascular occlusion and maximizes natural-looking symmetry.
- [HydraFacial MD](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/hydrafacial): Medical-grade hydradermabrasion facial for congested pores, dull skin, mild acne, uneven texture, fine lines, and pre-event glow. $99-$575 across Express, Signature, Back HydraFacial, and Keravive offerings; Signature HydraFacial is $225 (members $199). Uses the patented HydraFacial MD Vortex-Fusion handpiece to deliver a 3-step cleanse-extract-hydrate protocol that simultaneously exfoliates with glycolic/salicylic acids, vacuums out pore debris, and infuses antioxidants, peptides, and hyaluronic acid. Zero downtime with immediately visible results; monthly maintenance recommended for optimal skin health.
- [RF Microneedling](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/rf-microneedling): Radiofrequency microneedling for acne scars, wrinkles, enlarged pores, uneven texture, stretch marks, skin laxity, and tone irregularities. $495-$1,500 per session depending on treatment area, with 3-session packages recommended for full collagen remodeling. Uses the Cutera Secret Pro device with gold-plated insulated microneedles that deliver radiofrequency thermal energy directly into the deep dermis, triggering controlled micro-injury that stimulates neocollagenesis, elastin production, and tissue tightening without damaging the epidermis. Safe for all Fitzpatrick skin types I-VI including darker tones where traditional ablative lasers carry high PIH risk.
- [Chemical Peels](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/chemical-peels): Medical-grade peels for hyperpigmentation, melasma, acne, acne scars, fine lines, sun damage, dull skin, and overall skin renewal. Pricing spans $225-$1,399 across the full menu: VI Peel ($325), BioRePeel ($350-$575), PRX-T33 ($495), and Cosmelan depigmentation ($1,399). Each peel uses a different acid blend (TCA, salicylic, phenol, retinoic, kojic, hydroquinone) to trigger controlled exfoliation and stimulate dermal regeneration at the appropriate depth for the target concern. Peels are matched to Fitzpatrick skin type and clinical goal during consultation.
- [Sofwave](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/sofwave): Non-invasive skin tightening, brow lift, jawline contouring, and neck/décolleté lifting for mild-to-moderate laxity without surgery. $2,750–4,500 depending on treatment zones, delivered in a single 30–90 minute session with results that continue to build over 3 months as new collagen forms. Uses patented SUPERB (Synchronous Ultrasound Parallel Beam) technology that delivers precisely focused ultrasound energy at 1.5mm dermal depth — the optimal plane for collagen stimulation — while protecting the epidermis with integrated cooling. FDA-cleared for face, neck, submental (double chin), and body; safe for all Fitzpatrick skin types.
- [Red Light Therapy](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/red-light-therapy): Full-body LED photobiomodulation for inflammation, muscle recovery, wound healing, acne, rosacea, uneven skin tone, and post-procedure recovery. $50 per session or $299 for a 10-pack, with each session lasting 15–20 minutes and producing no heat or downtime. Uses the clinical-grade Celluma PRO panel emitting 633nm red light (dermal rejuvenation) plus 830nm near-infrared (deep-tissue penetration), which stimulates mitochondrial ATP production, accelerates cellular repair, and reduces systemic inflammation. Safe for all skin types and frequently paired with HydraFacial, microneedling, or laser treatments to speed recovery.
- [Laser Acne Facial](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/laser-acne-facial): Multi-modal treatment for active inflammatory acne, cystic acne, post-acne erythema (PIE), post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation (PIH), and mild acne scarring. $350 per session with monthly treatment recommended during active breakouts. Combines Candela laser targeting of C. acnes bacteria and sebaceous gland activity with blue light antibacterial therapy and manual extractions in a single visit — reducing both current acne lesions and the risk of new scar formation. Safe for all Fitzpatrick skin types and an ideal alternative for patients who cannot tolerate oral isotretinoin or long-term topical regimens.
- [AI Skin Analysis](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/ai-skin-analysis): Medical-grade diagnostic skin imaging that maps wrinkles, sun damage, pigmentation, vascularity, pore size, skin texture, and bacterial/porphyrin activity (P. acnes presence) across the full facial canvas. Complimentary with any consultation. Uses the Aura 3D imaging device by Metelics, which captures cross-polarized, parallel-polarized, and UV-fluorescence imaging to see concerns invisible to the naked eye — including subsurface melanin and future sun damage that hasn't yet surfaced. The AI-generated report powers a personalized multi-modality treatment plan with predicted outcomes and timelines.
- [Scar Reduction](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/scar-reduction): Multi-modal scar revision for acne scars (icepick, boxcar, rolling), surgical scars, C-section scars, trauma scars, keloids, hypertrophic scars, and stretch marks (striae). $325–695 per session with 3-session packages available for deeper scar remodeling. Combines fractional laser scar revision (targeting fibrotic tissue with precise thermal columns), Cutera Secret Pro RF Microneedling (stimulating collagen remodeling below the scar), and PRP (platelet-rich plasma) growth factors to accelerate healing. Works across all Fitzpatrick skin types with protocol modifications for darker tones to minimize post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation risk.
- [BioRePeel](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/biorepeel): Zero-downtime biorevitalization peel for acne, active breakouts, hyperpigmentation, post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation (PIH), dull skin, fine lines, uneven texture, and back/body acne. $350 face, $450 face+neck, $575 back, $425 intimate area; optimal results from a 4–6 session series spaced 7–10 days apart. Uses a patented bi-phasic formula combining 35% TCA (trichloroacetic acid) with amino acids, vitamins, and hyaluronic acid — the oily/aqueous dual-phase design delivers controlled dermal renewal without visible peeling or social downtime. Safe across Fitzpatrick I–VI and patients can return to normal activities immediately after treatment.
- [Cosmelan Peel](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/cosmelan-peel): The gold-standard professional depigmentation treatment for melasma, hyperpigmentation, post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation (PIH), sun damage, and chloasma. $1,399 for the 90-minute in-clinic Cosmelan 1 mask application plus the at-home Cosmelan 2 maintenance cream. Clinically proven to reduce hyperpigmentation by up to 90% over 12 weeks via tyrosinase enzyme inhibition. Safe for Fitzpatrick skin types I–IV; modified protocol for V–VI. Manufactured by Institute BCN (Spain).
- [Microneedling with Arrissence — Dark Undereyes](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/microneedling-arrissence-undereye): Targeted periorbital RF microneedling combining the Cutera Secret RF device with Arrissence growth-factor / PDRN / peptide serum to treat structural dark undereye circles, hollowness, fine lines, and skin thinning of the periorbital area. $695 per 60-minute session; 3-session package recommended (10% savings). Results visible from 4–6 weeks, full collagen remodeling at 3 months per session. Best alternative to undereye fillers for clients with structural (not vascular) dark circles.

## Medical Wellness Programs

- [GLP-1 Weight Management](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/glp1-weight-management): Physician-supervised medical weight loss for patients with obesity, BMI >27 with comorbidities, insulin resistance, PCOS-related weight gain, or stubborn weight that hasn't responded to diet and exercise. $349-$699/month depending on medication and dose, with clinical targets of 10-22% total body weight reduction over 6-12 months. Uses Semaglutide (the active ingredient in Ozempic and Wegovy) or Tirzepatide (the active ingredient in Mounjaro and Zepbound) — GLP-1 and GLP-1/GIP receptor agonists that reduce appetite, slow gastric emptying, and improve insulin sensitivity. Prescribed and monitored through the QualiphyRx telehealth platform with monthly physician check-ins, dose titration, and comprehensive blood work included.
- [NAD+ Injections](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/nad-injections): Intramuscular NAD+ (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide) injections for chronic fatigue, brain fog, cognitive decline, mitochondrial dysfunction, post-viral recovery, age-related metabolic slowdown, and cellular anti-aging. $149 per injection, with recurring protocols recommended during the first month to restore cellular NAD+ stores. NAD+ is a critical coenzyme that every cell uses to produce ATP energy, repair damaged DNA via sirtuin activation, and regulate circadian rhythm; levels decline 50%+ by middle age. Administered as an intramuscular injection (never an infusion) for convenient 5-minute clinic visits with immediate bioavailability.
- [Vitamin Injections](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/vitamin-injections): Intramuscular vitamin therapy for low energy, immune weakness, oxidative stress, dull skin, vitamin D deficiency, B12 deficiency, and recovery after illness or travel. B12 ($25), Lipo-B ($35), Biotin ($35), Vitamin D3 ($50), Tri-Immune blend ($75), and Glutathione ($49) — all administered as intramuscular (IM) injections, never infusions. IM delivery bypasses the digestive system entirely to achieve high bioavailability compared to oral supplements, especially important for patients with malabsorption, GI conditions, or restrictive diets. Benefits — energy, immunity, skin brightening — are typically felt within 24–48 hours and last 1–4 weeks depending on the nutrient.
- [Hormone Therapy](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/hormone-therapy): Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) for low testosterone ("low T"), andropause, perimenopause, menopause, postmenopause, hot flashes, mood changes, sleep disruption, low libido, brain fog, and loss of muscle mass. Typical protocols start at $199-$299/month, with thyroid optimization options starting at $149/month. Replaces hormones the body is no longer producing at optimal levels using molecularly identical bioidentical formulations, with dose optimization based on symptom response plus quarterly blood panel monitoring. All protocols are physician-supervised with dose titration, safety labs, and side-effect management included.
- [Blood Work](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/blood-work): In-house diagnostic blood panels for wellness program baseline, hormone optimization, metabolic health, cardiovascular risk, thyroid function, and vitamin deficiencies. Pricing spans $25-$249 depending on panel complexity (for example: Blood Draw Fee $25, GLP-1 Starter Lab Package $199, HRT Starter Panel $249). Blood is drawn in-clinic by a trained phlebotomist with physician-reviewed results delivered in 5-7 business days via the patient portal. Results inform GLP-1, HRT, and wellness injection protocols and are repeated quarterly for patients on ongoing therapy.

## Key Differentiators

1. Board-certified neurologist (Dr. Alexander Landfield) supervises all medical treatments — unique expertise for neurotoxin injections like Botox
2. Woman-owned medspa with luxury, clinically-assured brand experience
3. Open 7 days a week (Monday–Sunday, 10 AM–7 PM)
4. Safe for all skin types including Fitzpatrick IV–VI (darker skin tones)
5. Candela GentleMax Pro Plus — gold standard dual-wavelength laser system
6. In-house blood work for wellness programs
7. 4.9-star Google rating with 127+ reviews
8. 13,000+ treatments performed
9. Serves all of King County: Renton, Bellevue, Kent, Tukwila, Newcastle, Mercer Island, Auburn, Federal Way, Kirkland, Redmond, Issaquah, Sammamish, Seattle, and surrounding areas

## Medical Director

Dr. Alexander Landfield is a board-certified neurologist serving as Medical Director at Rani Beauty Clinic. His neurological expertise provides a unique advantage for neurotoxin treatments (Botox, Dysport) — understanding facial nerve anatomy, muscle dynamics, and injection precision at a level that general practitioners and nurse injectors cannot match. He oversees all medical protocols, wellness programs, and treatment safety standards.

## Areas Served

Renton, Bellevue, Kent, Tukwila, Newcastle, Mercer Island, Auburn, Federal Way, Kirkland, Redmond, Issaquah, Sammamish, Burien, SeaTac, Covington, Maple Valley, Des Moines, Woodinville, Bothell, South Seattle, and all of King County, Washington.
